title: Tsuchiya Family Oral History Transcript
creator: Nicholls, Lourdes
description: Please visit the California Revealed website to see the most complete and up-to-date version of this object: https://californiarevealed.org/node/513833 . Lourdes Nicholls interviewed her grandparents about their experience during the incarceration of Japanese Americans during WWII. Her grandfather, Kiyotsugu Tsuchiya, was the director of the Manzanar Visual Education Museum.
